## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / capability
- [ ] New adapter
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `ruff check` and `ruff format` pass locally
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md`, `docs/`) if user-facing surface changed
- [ ] No telemetry, no mandatory cloud calls added
- [ ] Heavy/optional deps gated behind extras in `pyproject.toml`
